# rescale

Rescale the ShapeWithText.

Supported on:

*   [ShapeWithTextNode](/docs/plugins/api/ShapeWithTextNode/)

## Signature​

### rescale(scale: number): void

## Parameters​

### scale​

The scale by which to resize the node from the top-left corner.
